title: C:C&A Electrum Recipe
description: A recipe for Create: Crafts & Additions electrum that is meant for Skyblock.
body:
A datapack for [Skyblock Infi-Crea](https://modrinth.com/modpack/skyblock-infi-crea) that makes electrum from Create: Crafts & Additions obtainable in limited world generation.

The recipe is zapping a brass ingot with a tesla coil to create an electrum ingot.

Simple and easy while making sense and being balanced.

This is also my first datapack.
Minor assistance with assembling it by MCreator.
